languages.text: "Но перед этим не ответишь ли ты на пару вопросов, еретик? В первую очередь, меня интересуют методики, которыми ты..." {n}Эоганн прерывается, прислушиваясь, после чего вздыхает.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус. Не время и не место".

"But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."
languages.original_text: "Но перед этим не ответишь ли ты на пару вопросов, еретик? В первую очередь, меня интересуют методики, которыми ты..." {n}Эоганн прерывается, прислушиваясь, после чего вздыхает.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус. Не время и не место".

traits.locale_text: "But before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I demand to know the arts by which you..." {n}Eogunn falters, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuntius. This is neither the hour nor the place for such discourse."

"But before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

"But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

"But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

languages.text: "Aber ehe wir fortfahren, gestattet Ihr mir einige Fragen, verdammter Ketzer? Mich interessieren in erster Linie die Techniken, mit denen Ihr ..." {n}Eogunn hält inne, neigt seinen Kopf, als würde er zuhören und atmet schließlich rasselnd aus.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius. Das ist nicht die richtige Zeit und der richtige Ort für einen derartigen Diskurs."
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: "Aber ehe wir fortfahren, gestattet Ihr mir einige Fragen, verdammter Ketzer? Mich interessieren in erster Linie die Techniken, mit denen Ihr ..." {n}Eogunn hält inne, neigt seinen Kopf, als würde er zuhören und atmet schließlich rasselnd aus.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Nuncius. Das ist nicht die richtige Zeit und der richtige Ort für einen derartigen Diskurs."

languages.text: “不过，在我们继续之前，你这可悲的异端，能否先回答我几个问题？首先，我必须知道你是用什么技术……”{n}伊奥贡顿了顿，倾斜着脑袋，像是在聆听什么，随后发出一声刺耳的叹息。{/n}“你说得对，努恩修斯。此时此地讨论此事确实不合适。”
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: “不过，在我们继续之前，你这可悲的异端，能否先回答我几个问题？首先，我必须知道你是用什么技术……”{n}伊奥贡顿了顿，倾斜着脑袋，像是在聆听什么，随后发出一声刺耳的叹息。{/n}“你说得对，努恩修斯。此时此地讨论此事确实不合适。”

languages.text: « Mais avant de commencer, pourrais-je vous poser quelques questions, infâme hérétique ? Pour commencer, j'aimerais connaître les techniques employées pour... » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt et penche la tête comme s'il écoutait quelque chose avant de pousser un long soupir.{/n} « C'est vrai, Nuncius. Ce n'est ni le lieu ni le moment pour avoir cette conversation. »
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: « Mais avant de commencer, pourrais-je vous poser quelques questions, infâme hérétique ? Pour commencer, j'aimerais connaître les techniques employées pour... » {n}Eogunn s'interrompt et penche la tête comme s'il écoutait quelque chose avant de pousser un long soupir.{/n} « C'est vrai, Nuncius. Ce n'est ni le lieu ni le moment pour avoir cette conversation. »

languages.text: «Pero antes de proceder, ¿le importaría responder algunas preguntas, desdichado hereje? Por encima de todo, he de conocer las técnicas que ha empleado para...». {n}Eogunn hace una pausa, ladea la cabeza como si estuviese escuchando, y luego deja escapar un ronco suspiro.{/n} «Tienes razón, Nuncius. No es el momento ni el lugar para esta conversación».
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: «Pero antes de proceder, ¿le importaría responder algunas preguntas, desdichado hereje? Por encima de todo, he de conocer las técnicas que ha empleado para...». {n}Eogunn hace una pausa, ladea la cabeza como si estuviese escuchando, y luego deja escapar un ronco suspiro.{/n} «Tienes razón, Nuncius. No es el momento ni el lugar para esta conversación».

languages.text: "Devam etmeden önce birkaç soruma katlanabilir misin sefil kâfir? Her şeyden önce beni... Hangi tekniklerle bu hâle getirdiğini bilmeliyim." {n}Eogunn duraksıyor, başını dinliyormuş gibi eğiyor. Ardından rahatsız edici bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Haklısın Nuncius. Bu tür söylemlerin ne yeri ne de zamanı."
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: "Devam etmeden önce birkaç soruma katlanabilir misin sefil kâfir? Her şeyden önce beni... Hangi tekniklerle bu hâle getirdiğini bilmeliyim." {n}Eogunn duraksıyor, başını dinliyormuş gibi eğiyor. Ardından rahatsız edici bir iç çekiyor.{/n} "Haklısın Nuncius. Bu tür söylemlerin ne yeri ne de zamanı."

languages.text: 「しかし、先へ進む前に、いくつか質問にお付き合い願えますか、哀れな異端者よ？ 何よりもまず、あなたがどのような技法で……」{n}エオガンは言葉を止め、耳を澄ますように首を傾げると、耳障りなため息を漏らした。{/n}「君の言う通りです、ヌンキウス。今はそのような議論の時でも場所でもありません」
languages.original_text: "But, before we proceed, would you indulge a few questions, wretched heretic? Foremost, I must know the techniques by which you..." {n}Eogunn pauses, tilting his head as if listening, then exhales a grating sigh.{/n} "You are right, Nuncius. This is neither the time nor the place for such discourse."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、先へ進む前に、いくつか質問にお付き合い願えますか、哀れな異端者よ？ 何よりもまず、あなたがどのような技法で……」{n}エオガンは言葉を止め、耳を澄ますように首を傾げると、耳障りなため息を漏らした。{/n}「君の言う通りです、ヌンキウス。今はそのような議論の時でも場所でもありません」
